pendingApplications.address: Former Atc Centre Cossington Road Canterbury Kent CT1 3HU
pendingApplications.proposal: 4 Two-storey terrace dwellings together with two storey building with 2 apartments following the demolition of existing building.

pendingApplications.address: Highfield Boyden Gate Hill Chislet Kent CT3 4ED
pendingApplications.proposal: Application for determination as to whether prior approval is required for the change of use of existing agricultural building to 6 dwellings.

pendingApplications.address: Kingdom Hall Of Jehovahs Witnesses Albert Street Whitstable Kent CT5 1HT
pendingApplications.proposal: Non-material amendment to planning permission CA/25/00298/FUL for the Change of Use of existing Hall to 2 dwellings together with 2 semi-detached two-storey dwellings following demolition of existing outbuilding; to allow the retaining existing outbuilding, repositioning of proposed rooflight and omission of 1 no rooflight, materail change from render to reclaimed bricks and from steel balustrade to stained timber slatted fence, Increase in proposed rear outrigger ridge height together with change of timber framed sliding glazed doors to slimline aluminium framed sliding glazed doors.

pendingApplications.address: Chartham Paper Mill Station Road Chartham Kent CT4 7JA
pendingApplications.proposal: Alterations and extensions to existing 2-storey residential terrace to facilitate the amalgamation of 12 dwellings into 8 dwellings; erection of 2-storey buildings to create 8 dwellings following demolition of storage shed; together with access, parking, landscaping and associated works.

pendingApplications.address: Land North And South Of New Dover Road Canterbury Extending North To Canterbury-Dover Railway Line West To Nackington Road And South To A2.
pendingApplications.proposal: Non-material amendment to planning permission CA//16/00600/OUT for the hybrid planning application for urban extension of up to 4,000 dwellings; to reserve all matters except Access (but not including access from New Dover Road into the Northern Neighbourhood and internal circulation); to allow amendments to the parameter plans, omission of one high building, expansion of Ridge Park, repositioning of spine road and associated land parcels and inclusion of UKPN infrastructure with associated amendments to conditions schedule, including deletions of conditions 1,7,14,41,43,45,47,48,49,50,51,52 and 53, and amendments to the wording of conditions 3,8,13,15,16,17,18,19,21,22,29,30,32,34,35,37,39,40,42,44,46,56,57,58,60 and 64.

pendingApplications.address: Hoplands Farm Island Road Hersden Kent CT3 4HQ
